data.body: #766 (568c) enrich-prune flake recurring (lost count varies 45-241 = non-deterministic race, worse under current CI load). Confirmed ONLY that test fails; no creation_channel/snapshot/_processors/fsck failures. Started a self-rechecking poll (auto-recheck up to 6x, exit green on Verified +1). 6fe2 #764 + e622 #765 both green+closed. Once #766 Verified +1: close 568c -> submit #766 (lands 6fe2+e622+568c atomically on origin/main) -> fetch origin -> close epic jira-reb-977 (its child-trailers-on-main AC then satisfied).
